scope_caveats: FODO cell parameters (L_d=1 m drift, L_q=0.1 m quad, k1=0.25) are TEXTBOOK — NOT calibrated to any real ring (LHC / FCC-ee / SPS). This is an ANALYZE characterization (periodic 4-D Twiss summary), distinct from the cern+synthesize parity which shipped only beta_x_max + q_x against the Wiedemann/Lee thick-quad oracle.

Dispersion D_x = D_y = 0 because the cell has no dipoles (pure quad+drift FODO) — physically correct for this lattice, not a missing field. Natural chromaticity dQ_x = dQ_y < 0 as expected for a focusing lattice with no sextupole correction.

Optics-only — no space charge, IBS, impedance, beam-beam, or radiation. measurement_gate = GATE_OPEN / absorbed=false: this is ALGORITHM output, not a measured-ring tune. A flip needs a sourced ring optics deck + measured Twiss.
